title: vitis × doaniana
intro: Vitis × doaniana, also known as Doan's grape, is a rare and hybrid species of grapevine, resulting from the cross between Vitis labrusca and Vitis riparia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Vitis × doaniana include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of Vitis × doaniana can be found in the form of extracts, tinctures, and infusions, often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
